ddls:
CREATE TABLE "covid_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data collection */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the data was collected */,
  "active_cases" INTEGER /* Number of active cases on the given date */,
  "new_cases" INTEGER /* Number of new cases reported on the given date */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths reported on the given date */,
  "recovered_cases" INTEGER /* Number of recovered cases reported on the given date */,
  "tests_conducted" INTEGER /* Number of tests conducted on the given date */,
  "test_positive_rate" TEXT /* Percentage of positive tests on the given date */,
  "hospitalization_rate" TEXT /* Percentage of hospitalizations on the given date */,
  "icu_admissions" INTEGER /* Number of ICU admissions on the given date */,
  "ventilator_use" INTEGER /* Number of ventilators in use on the given date */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., City, County, State) */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province where the region is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the region is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Estimated population of the region */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the region */,
  "area_km2" TEXT /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., Department of Health, Hospital) */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., Government, Private) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the data source */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for inquiries about the data source */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_source_map" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "data_sharing_agreement" INTEGER /* Indicates if a data sharing agreement exists between the region and the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_map_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_map_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., health official, researcher, data analyst) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES covid_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being validated */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date when the validation was performed */,
  "validator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the validation */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Status of the validation (e.g., valid, invalid) */,
  "error_description" TEXT /* Description of any errors found during validation */,
  "error_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the error (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_validator_id FOREIGN KEY ("validator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES covid_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sharing_agreements" (
  "agreement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agreement */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "agreement_date" TEXT /* Date when the agreement was signed */,
  "agreement_terms" TEXT /* Terms of the agreement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agreement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_agreements_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_agreements_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the request */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was made */,
  "data_requested" TEXT /* Description of the data requested */,
  "request_status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each export */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being exported */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user exporting the data */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was exported */,
  "export_format" TEXT /* Format of the exported data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES covid_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "audit_action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., data update, data deletion) */,
  "audit_description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
